name: Nutcracker Apricot Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in preserves, milk, and eggs.
3. Add combined dry ingredients, mixing just until moistened.
4. Stir in nuts.
5. Spoon batter into greased and floured medium-sized muffin pans, filling each cup 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 - 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
